{{Quote|I'm the Journeyman Protector here...I'm the law.|Constable Fett|<ref name="Jango Fett: Open Seasons 1">[[Jango Fett: Open Seasons 1|''Jango Fett: Open Seasons'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Fett''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Farmer/Legends|farmer]] of [[Clan Fett]] who served as the [[Constable/Legends|constable]] [[Journeyman Protector/Legends|Journeyman Protector]] of [[Concord Dawn/Legends|Concord Dawn]] after the exile of his predecessor, [[Jaster Mereel]]. He was a descendant of the famed [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusader]] [[Cassus Fett]], as well as the father of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango]] and [[Arla Fett]], and by extension, the "grandfather" of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], Jango's [[Cloning/Legends|cloned son]].

==Biography==
Fett was a farmer by trade and owned a [[Fett homestead|homestead]] on Concord Dawn. He married and had at least two children, Jango and Arla. In [[58 BBY/Legends|58 BBY]], he hid [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Jaster Mereel]] and his [[Mandalorian Supercommando|Supercommandos]] from the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]], but was killed for it, along with his wife, during the [[Battle of Concord Dawn]]. Jango survived the battle and was taken in by Mereel,<ref name="Jango Fett: Open Seasons 1" /> while Arla was forced to serve the Death Watch, but eventually escaped and was put in a mental institution on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] until [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="Imperial Commando: 501st" />
